chapter_title.en: Chapter 133 – The Saltwort (a salt-water plant), and the Cyperus

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/227)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/227)
text: رَأَيْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الْحِجْرِ وَ هُوَ قَاعِدٌ وَ مَعَهُ عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ فَسَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ ضُرِبَتْ عَلَيَّ أَسْنَانِي فَأَخَذْتُ السُّعْدَ فَدَلَكْتُ بِهِ أَسْنَانِي فَنَفَعَنِي ذَلِكَ وَ سَكَنَتْ عَنِّي .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ibn Mahboub, from Abu Wallad who said,

‘I saw Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> the 1<sup>st</sup> in Al Hijr (at the Kabah), and he<sup>asws</sup> was seated, and with him<sup>asws</sup> were a number of his<sup>asws</sup> family members, so I hear him<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘My teeth hurt, so I took the cyperus and rubbed it down by my teeth, and that benefitted me, and settled down from it’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ibn Mahbub from abu Wallad who has said the following: “I once saw abu al-Hassan sitting in al-Hijr (near al-Ka‘bah) along with a group of his family members and I heard him saying, ‘I had a toothache so I took cyperus and rubbed with it my teeth, it benefited me and the pain calmed down.’” End of the Book of Foods followed by the Book of Drinks, by the will of Allah, and all praise belongs to Allah alone, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause."
